channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cornyn’s defeat leaves Republicans with a more vulnerable Senate nominee: ANALYSIS
item.description: Sen. John Cornyn is just the latest high-profile Republican incumbent to learn that in today’s GOP, conservative credentials are no match for Trump’s ...

item.title: Paxton projected to win Texas Senate GOP runoff, defeating incumbent Cornyn
item.description: President Trump had endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in the primary runoff.

item.title: Five of seven people trapped in flooded Laos cave for over a week found alive
item.description: Rescuers reported that five villagers trapped in a flooded cave in central Laos for more than a week were found alive, while two remain missing.

item.title: Father and daughter take road trip to rescue two calves
item.description: ABC News' Danny New speaks with filmmaker Joanna Zelman and her father, Jared, who helped transport two 10-day-old calves from Vermont farms to a sanctuary.
